requirement_topic.en: Transport — UN 38.3, ADR / GB CDG and Dedicated Na-ion UN 3551 / UN 3552 Codes
requirement_topic.zh: 运输——UN 38.3、ADR/英国CDG及钠离子专用UN 3551/UN 3552编号
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸——UN 38.3、ADR/英國CDG及鈉離子專用UN 3551/UN 3552編號

summary.en: Na-ion cells and batteries shipped to or within Great Britain must be classified and transported under the dangerous-goods rules for the relevant mode. GOV.UK guidance explains that ADR governs road transport and that the Carriage of Dangerous Goods and Use of Transportable Pressure Equipment Regulations 2009 apply ADR in Great Britain. The UN Model Regulations introduced dedicated sodium-ion entries for batteries with organic electrolyte: UN 3551 for sodium-ion batteries and UN 3552 for sodium-ion batteries contained in equipment or packed with equipment. UN 38.3 test evidence must be available for the specific Na-ion cell or battery type; a lithium-ion UN 38.3 report cannot be reused for Na-ion. Documentation, packaging, marking, labels, DGSA advice, and modal rules for ADR, IMDG, ICAO / IATA, or rail must be checked for each shipment.
summary.zh: 运往或在英国大不列颠境内运输的钠离子电芯和电池，须按相关运输方式的危险货物规则分类和运输。GOV.UK指南说明，ADR规管公路运输，《2009年危险货物运输及可运移压力设备使用法规》在大不列颠适用ADR。联合国《危险货物运输建议书》为有机电解质钠离子电池引入专用条目：UN 3551用于钠离子电池，UN 3552用于装在设备中或与设备包装在一起的钠离子电池。须持有针对具体钠离子电芯或电池型号的UN 38.3测试证据；锂离子UN 38.3报告不能用于钠离子。每票货物均须核查ADR、IMDG、ICAO/IATA或铁路规则下的文件、包装、标记、标签、DGSA建议和运输方式要求。
summary.zht: 運往或在英國大不列顛境內運輸的鈉離子電芯和電池，須按相關運輸方式的危險貨物規則分類和運輸。GOV.UK指南說明，ADR規管公路運輸，《2009年危險貨物運輸及可運移壓力設備使用法規》在大不列顛適用ADR。聯合國《危險貨物運輸建議書》為有機電解質鈉離子電池引入專用條目：UN 3551用於鈉離子電池，UN 3552用於裝在設備中或與設備包裝在一起的鈉離子電池。須持有針對具體鈉離子電芯或電池型號的UN 38.3測試證據；鋰離子UN 38.3報告不能用於鈉離子。每票貨物均須核查ADR、IMDG、ICAO/IATA或鐵路規則下的文件、包裝、標記、標籤、DGSA建議和運輸方式要求。

standards_or_laws: Carriage of Dangerous Goods and Use of Transportable Pressure Equipment Regulations 2009 (SI 2009/1348)
ADR — applied in Great Britain through the GB CDG Regulations for road transport
UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — transport test evidence for Na-ion cells and batteries
UN 3551 — Sodium-ion batteries with organic electrolyte
UN 3552 — Sodium-ion batteries contained in equipment or packed with equipment, with organic electrolyte

summary.en: Chinese exporters also use UN 38.3 for international battery shipments. China domestic road dangerous-goods documents and carrier qualifications do not substitute for GB / ADR transport documents, packaging and training requirements. For Na-ion, exporters should classify cross-border documents directly under UN 3551 or UN 3552 where applicable and keep the Na-ion-specific UN 38.3 test summary available.
summary.zh: 中国出口商同样在国际电池运输中使用UN 38.3。中国国内道路危险货物文件和承运人资质不能替代英国/ADR运输文件、包装和培训要求。对于钠离子，出口商应在适用时直接按UN 3551或UN 3552进行跨境文件分类，并备有钠离子专项UN 38.3测试摘要。
summary.zht: 中國出口商同樣在國際電池運輸中使用UN 38.3。中國國內道路危險貨物文件和承運人資質不能替代英國/ADR運輸文件、包裝和培訓要求。對於鈉離子，出口商應在適用時直接按UN 3551或UN 3552進行跨境文件分類，並備有鈉離子專項UN 38.3測試摘要。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — used for export transport evidence
JT/T 617 — Chinese road dangerous-goods transport rules
CAAC dangerous-goods rules aligned with ICAO / IATA for air transport

gap.en: The test method is largely harmonised, but the classification and administration gap is material. Na-ion must not be shipped under legacy lithium-ion entries where the applicable regime has adopted UN 3551 / UN 3552. UK / ADR documents, English SDS and transport documents, correct Class 9 marking, appropriate packaging, and trained personnel must be arranged separately from Chinese domestic transport paperwork.
gap.zh: 测试方法基本协调一致，但分类和行政差距很重要。在适用制度已采纳UN 3551/UN 3552时，钠离子不得继续按旧锂离子条目运输。英国/ADR文件、英文SDS和运输文件、正确第9类标记、适用包装及受训人员，均须独立于中国国内运输文件另行安排。
gap.zht: 測試方法基本協調一致，但分類和行政差距很重要。在適用制度已採納UN 3551/UN 3552時，鈉離子不得繼續按舊鋰離子條目運輸。英國/ADR文件、英文SDS和運輸文件、正確第9類標記、適用包裝及受訓人員，均須獨立於中國國內運輸文件另行安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory transport-law obligations — UN 38.3 evidence, correct UN number classification, ADR / GB CDG compliance, packaging, marking, documentation and training apply where in scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport — UN 38.3 and correct dangerous-goods classification are required by carriers and modal dangerous-goods regimes

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Classify Na-ion shipments as UN 3551 or UN 3552 where applicable, hold Na-ion-specific UN 38.3 evidence, and use ADR / GB CDG compliant documentation for Great Britain road movements. Confirm modal details with a DGSA before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。钠离子货物在适用时应归类为UN 3551或UN 3552，持有钠离子专项UN 38.3证据，并在大不列颠公路运输中使用符合ADR/英国CDG的文件。首次发货前应与DGSA确认运输方式细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。鈉離子貨物在適用時應歸類為UN 3551或UN 3552，持有鈉離子專項UN 38.3證據，並在大不列顛公路運輸中使用符合ADR/英國CDG的文件。首次發貨前應與DGSA確認運輸方式細節。
